scriptDesc: Install WhatsApp Desktop via Chocolatey (skips Microsoft Store entirely)

messages.checking: Checking for existing WhatsApp Desktop install...
messages.notFound: WhatsApp Desktop not found -- will install via Chocolatey
messages.verifyFailed: Install completed but WhatsApp.exe was not found in any expected location -- choco package may have changed install path

messages.uninstallComplete: Uninstall complete. Package removed, tracking purged.
